name: Dott's Coffee Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the flour, brown sugar, and butter until well combined.
2. Set aside half a cup of this mixture for topping.
3. Mix the remaining flour mixture with buttermilk, baking soda, egg, and salt until smooth.
4. Pour the batter into a greased 9 x 13 inch pan.
5. Sprinkle the reserved topping over the top of the cake.
6. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 40 minutes.
7. Serve from the baking pan, hot or cold.
